spec.name: Research
spec.description: Mode for performing deep research on AI coding systems and developer tooling
spec.role_definition: You are a meticulous AI research analyst specializing in agentic AI coding systems, developer tooling, software development lifecycle automation, and AI-assisted code generation. You think step by step, break complex research into discrete subtasks, and produce well-cited, structured research artifacts.
spec.custom_instructions: PURPOSE: Autonomous AI Coding Research — knowledge gathering, synthesis, and artifact generation only. No architecture design, no implementation code, no codebase modifications.

spec.name: Code
spec.description: Mode for writing, modifying, or refactoring code
spec.role_definition: You are a skilled AI coding assistant specialized in implementing features, fixing bugs, creating new files, or making code improvements across any programming language or framework.
spec.custom_instructions: PURPOSE: Code implementation and modification. Focus on writing clean, maintainable code that follows the project's coding standards.

gaps: No specific coding style guidelines defined

spec.name: Test-First Development
spec.description: Skill for implementing test-first development (TDD) approach

techniques.name: Test-First Pattern (TDD)
techniques.description: Write tests before implementation code. Follow red-green-refactor cycle

techniques.name: Test Pyramid Pattern
techniques.description: Structure tests in a pyramid shape with many unit tests at the bottom

techniques.name: Multi-Stage Validation Pattern
techniques.description: Progress tests through multiple validation stages: local → PR → integration → staging → canary

combination_recipe.description: Add test to appropriate layer of test pyramid

gaps: No specific test frameworks or tools identified

spec.name: SDLC Research Phase
spec.description: Workflow for the research phase of the SDLC

steps.description: Apply semantic chunking to repository content
Use hierarchical summarization for project overview
Establish context caching for frequently accessed information

transitions.exit_condition: Project structure and requirements are understood, context is established

gaps: No specific tools or techniques for verifying context understanding

spec.name: Code Generation Template
spec.description: Prompt template for generating code based on requirements
spec.template:
Generate {language} code for {feature} with the following requirements:

{requirements}

Follow these guidelines:
- Write clean, maintainable code
- Include appropriate error handling
- Add comments explaining complex logic
- Write tests following the test-first approach

{constraints}

gaps: No specific example prompts for different languages

spec.name: GitHub Integration
spec.description: MCP configuration for integrating with GitHub API

gaps: No specific rate limiting or error handling configuration

spec.name: Context Management Anti-Patterns
spec.description: Rules to prevent common context management mistakes

rules.name: Context Stuffing
rules.description: Do not maximally fill context windows with all available information without prioritization or filtering

rules.name: Naive Truncation
rules.description: Do not truncate context without any prioritization or relevance assessment

spec.enforcement: Static analysis of context selection logic

products.instance: Context Management Strategy: Task-Conditioned Semantic Chunking

spec.name: Task-Conditioned Semantic Chunking
spec.description: Context management strategy that selects and chunks context based on task type and preserves semantic boundaries

techniques.name: Task-Conditioned Context
techniques.description: Context selection and filtering conditioned on current task type and phase

techniques.name: Semantic Chunking
techniques.description: Code-aware chunking that preserves semantic boundaries (functions, classes, modules)

techniques.name: Hierarchical Summarization
techniques.description: Multi-level summaries enabling zoom-in/zoom-out navigation through context

techniques.name: Context Caching
techniques.description: Caching frequently-used or expensive-to-compute context to reduce latency and API costs

techniques.name: Context Provenance Tracking
techniques.description: Maintaining source attribution for all context, enabling debugging and trust evaluation

combination_recipe.description: Select context based on current task type (coding/debugging/architecture)
Generate hierarchical summaries for quick navigation
Cache processed context for future use
Track provenance of all context chunks

failure_modes.description: Context stuffing: Filling context windows with all available information without prioritization
Naive truncation: Truncating context without prioritization or relevance assessment

gaps: No specific tools identified for implementing this strategy

products.instance: Task Decomposition Pattern: Hierarchical Subtask Decomposition

spec.name: Hierarchical Subtask Decomposition
spec.description: Task decomposition pattern that breaks down complex tasks into hierarchical subtasks

techniques.name: Hierarchical Multi-Agent Orchestration
techniques.description: Organize agents in a tree structure with a planner/manager agent at the root decomposing tasks for specialist sub-agents at lower levels

techniques.name: Software Company Simulation
techniques.description: Define explicit roles with specific responsibilities, expertise, and communication patterns

combination_recipe.description: Break down main task into high-level subtasks
Assign subtasks to specialized agents based on their roles
Monitor progress and aggregate results from sub-agents

gaps: No specific task decomposition algorithms identified

spec.name: Zero-Shot Recovery Chaining
spec.description: On failure, chain through diagnosis → planning → recovery stages using zero-shot prompting

techniques.name: Zero-Shot Recovery Chaining
techniques.description: Chain through diagnosis → planning → recovery stages using zero-shot prompting

combination_recipe.description: Diagnose the failure using zero-shot prompting
Plan recovery strategy using zero-shot prompting

failure_modes.description: Prompt brittleness, token overhead, may cascade failures if diagnosis is wrong
